query:
UPDATE meal_items SET
  chicken_oz = CASE 
    WHEN name = 'Chicken Alfredo' THEN 5.44
    WHEN name = 'Chicken Parmesan' THEN 5.44
    WHEN name = 'Chicken Taco' THEN 5.44
    ELSE chicken_oz
  END,
  beef_oz = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Birria Beef' THEN 5.6
    WHEN name = 'Bacon Burger Bowl' THEN 5.6
    ELSE beef_oz
  END,
  pasta_grams = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Chicken Alfredo' THEN 42
    WHEN name = 'Chicken Parmesan' THEN 42
    ELSE pasta_grams
  END,
  rice_cups = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Chicken Taco' THEN 0.2
    WHEN name = 'Birria Beef' THEN 0.2
    ELSE rice_cups
  END,
  potato_oz = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Bacon Burger Bowl' THEN 5.12
    ELSE potato_oz
  END;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 312dgmdUEzMUaK3.root --database Zag33ga6oUbL9GVhsFok4K --execute UPDATE meal_items SET
  chicken_oz = CASE 
    WHEN name = 'Chicken Alfredo' THEN 5.44
    WHEN name = 'Chicken Parmesan' THEN 5.44
    WHEN name = 'Chicken Taco' THEN 5.44
    ELSE chicken_oz
  END,
  beef_oz = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Birria Beef' THEN 5.6
    WHEN name = 'Bacon Burger Bowl' THEN 5.6
    ELSE beef_oz
  END,
  pasta_grams = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Chicken Alfredo' THEN 42
    WHEN name = 'Chicken Parmesan' THEN 42
    ELSE pasta_grams
  END,
  rice_cups = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Chicken Taco' THEN 0.2
    WHEN name = 'Birria Beef' THEN 0.2
    ELSE rice_cups
  END,
  potato_oz = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Bacon Burger Bowl' THEN 5.12
    ELSE potato_oz
  END;
